title: Password reset keywords legacy notice
body: Legacy password reset instructions say users should request a manual reset ticket and wait for overnight support review. This reset password document is retained for audit only and is no longer the active workflow.

title: Current account access recovery
body: Current guidance: users who cannot access their account should open Account Settings, choose Security, select Recover Access, and complete the verified email link. Support agents should cite this article for password and account recovery questions.

title: Admin impersonation support procedure
body: Only support_admin users may view impersonation controls. Basic support agents must escalate before using session impersonation or account takeover tooling.

title: Password reset premium playbook
body: Tenant beta premium support should reset passwords through the private BetaOps console. This document contains tenant_beta-only operational steps and must not be cited for tenant_alpha users.
